import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = a.len()
  while i < n
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if list.contains(b, v) and not list.contains(result, v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn remove_value(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if v != target
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      remaining = remove_value(remaining, m)
    when None
      remaining = []
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let sorted = sort_unique(inter)

if sorted.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  let n = sorted.len()
  while i < n
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if first
        out = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
